# llms.txt — Mind Centre for Learning
# Structured site summary for AI models (LLMs) to understand this website.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

## Mind Centre for Learning
> Premier tuition centre in Singapore (Serangoon, Bedok, Bishan). Primary, Secondary & JC tuition for English, Math, Science, Chinese, GP, Economics. Founded by David & Violet Lim. Small class sizes, proven results — PSLE AL1-3, O/A-Level A's.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg): Tuition centre overview — subjects, locations, results
- [About](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/about): Our story, founders David & Violet Lim, teaching philosophy
- [Teachers](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/teachers): Teacher profiles and qualifications
- [Learning System](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/learning-system): Critical Mind-Focused Learning methodology
- [Results](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/results): Student achievements — PSLE, O-Level, A-Level
- [Schedules](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/schedules): Class timetables by subject and level
- [Testimonials](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/testimonials): Parent and student reviews
- [Contact](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/contact): Address (Blk 265 Serangoon Central Drive #04-267, Singapore 550265), Phone (+65 9740 2024)
- [Enroll](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/enroll): Registration and trial class signup
- [Franchising](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/franchising): Tuition centre franchise opportunities
- [Blog](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/blog): 197+ education articles — study skills, math, science, exam tips

## Services
- Primary School Tuition (P1-P6): English, Chinese, Math, Science — PSLE preparation
- Secondary School Tuition (Sec 1-4): English, Math (E-Math, A-Math), Sciences, Humanities — O-Level/N-Level
- Junior College Tuition (JC1-JC2): GP, Economics, Math, Sciences — A-Level/IB
- 1-to-1 tutoring available for all subjects
- Small group classes (max 6-8 students)

## Locations
- Serangoon: Blk 265 Serangoon Central Drive #04-267, Singapore 550265 (near Serangoon MRT)
- Bedok: Bedok North (contact for address)
- Bishan: Bishan Central (contact for address)

## Contact
- Phone/WhatsApp: +65 9740 2024
- Email: all@mindcentre.sg
- Website: https://www.mindcentre.com.sg
